title: Global Mentorship & Leadership Program
summary: Structured mentorship, capability building, and guidance to unlock global opportunities for high-potential students and early-career professionals.
heroText: A structured program supporting high-potential students and early-career professionals to build clarity, leadership capability, and access to global opportunities.

steps.title: Apply
steps.description: We review applications and align support to needs.

steps.title: Match & Onboard
steps.description: Participants are onboarded and paired where relevant.

steps.title: Structured Support
steps.description: Mentorship sessions, guidance, and targeted development.

steps.title: Progress & Outcomes
steps.description: Clear goals, follow-through, and documented outcomes.

benefits.text: Global exposure through mentors and networks

eligibility.text: Secondary school students, university students, and early-career professionals
Strong motivation to grow and act on guidance
Commitment to program expectations and timelines

faq.question: Is the program free?
faq.answer: Program support is offered based on availability and cohort design. Some cohorts may be sponsored by partners to remove cost barriers.

faq.question: How are mentors matched?
faq.answer: Matching is based on goals, background, and availability. Some participants receive 1:1 mentorship; others join group mentorship or structured sessions.

faq.question: How long does the program run?
faq.answer: Cohort duration varies. You will receive timeline details after selection.

title: EmpowerHer
summary: Women-focused leadership development and empowerment initiatives to unlock confidence, capability, and access.
heroText: AODI’s women-focused initiative designed to support leadership development, confidence-building, and access to opportunity.

eligibility.text: Women and girls in secondary school, university, or early career

title: Campus Ambassador Program
summary: Campus-based engagement to identify high-potential talent and build leadership capacity within university communities.
heroText: A university-focused initiative that supports talent identification, leadership development, and community-based program delivery.

benefits.text: Access to training, networks, and AODI opportunities

eligibility.text: University students with strong leadership potential
